User.title: User
User.description: System operators and admin user profiles

id.description: The unique Firebase Auth UID of the user or operator

name.description: Full name of the user or operator

email.description: Email address of the user (e.g., kachramtech@gmail.com for Super Admin)

role.description: User hierarchy role determining access privileges

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this user profile was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this user profile was last updated

Farmer.title: Farmer
Farmer.description: Farmer profiles registered in the system

id.description: Unique auto-generated ID of the farmer

name.description: Name of the farmer in Hindi/Regional language or English

village.description: Village or region of the farmer

totalAcreage.description: Total farm acreage in acres (रकबा एकड़ में)

activeCrop.description: Active crop that expenses will link to by default

createdAt.description: Timestamp when farmer profile was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when farmer profile was last updated

createdByOperatorId.description: Auth UID of the operator or super admin who registered this farmer

lastUpdatedByOperatorId.description: Auth UID of the operator or super admin who last modified this profile

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Smart income/expense digital record for crops, mandi sales with transparent cuts and pending reminders

farmerId.description: Valid Reference ID of the farmer

category.description: Category of expense/income (e.g., seed, fertilizer, pesticide, diesel, labor, crop_sale)

amount.description: Total final transaction amount in INR

date.description: Financial date of entry (can be backdated via calendar)

isMandiSale.description: True if this represents a sale in the grain market (मंडी)

deductionRate.description: Deductions per quintal in kilograms (कचरा/नमी की काट किलोग्राम प्रति क्विंटल)

ratePerQuintal.description: Sale rate per quintal in INR

isCreditSale.description: True if sold on credit or partial payment

pendingAmount.description: Remaining receivable amount to be collected

dueDate.description: Agreed due date for outstanding balance reminder

voiceNoteUrl.description: URL to recorded Hindi/regional voice note stored in Firebase Storage

Labor.title: Labor
Labor.description: Individual attendance or Bulk/Gang contractual workforce tracking on farms

farmerId.description: Associated farmer ID whose field the labor took place on

crop.description: Crop associated with this labor expense

mode.description: Whether registered individually or as a contractor gang

workersCount.description: Number of workers in the gang (Bulk mode only)

groupName.description: Name of the labor gang/sardar (Bulk mode only)

contractAmount.description: Total promised contract wage (Both modes, individual daily rate can compute as contract)

advancePaid.description: Advance paid to worker or gang in INR

workDescription.description: Type of work performed (e.g., निराई, गुड़ाई, कटाई, बुवाई)

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Commercial audit logs documenting operator actions and system edits

operatorId.description: Auth UID of the operator who executed the action

targetCollection.description: The category collection of the target document

timestamp.description: ISO String representation of creation time

/users/{userId}.description: Users and operators of the application mappingauthUID

/farmers/{farmerId}.description: Farmers root profiles in the system

/transactions/{transactionId}.description: Financial accounting records of income or expense

/labor/{laborId}.description: Workforce logs for individual and contractor workers

/audits/{auditId}.description: Immutable audit trails tracking operator operations and CRUD actions
